headline: Luka Vuskovic
body: BREAKING: Brighton agree a £46m fee with Spurs for Luka Vuskovic, as FabrizioRomano called. Spurs retain a 20% sell-on. Understand the plan is for Vuskovic to undergo his medical with the national team if Croatia beat Portugal. Vuskovic has agreed a five-year contract.🇭🇷 🤝 alex_crook
raw_text:
BREAKING: Brighton agree a £46m fee with Spurs for Luka Vuskovic, as @FabrizioRomano called. Spurs retain a 20% sell-on.

Understand the plan is for Vuskovic to undergo his medical with the national team if Croatia beat Portugal.

Vuskovic has agreed a five-year contract.🇭🇷

🤝 @alex_crook
text:

Vuskovic has agreed a five-year contract.🇭🇷
